untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires multi-bar peak detection and consolidation valley identification. This requires historical peak/valley detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The specific conditions for identifying 'two peaks at approximately same price level' and 'consolidation valley between them' cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and allowed operators. Pattern recognition of this complexity requires custom pattern detection beyond the scope of basic indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern recognition (two peaks, valley, breakout confirmation) that exceeds the capabilities of point-in-time indicators. Provided a simplified approximation using pivot levels and volume confirmation as a proxy, but this does not capture the full double-top pattern logic. For proper implementation, a custom pattern detection function would be needed. Exit condition inferred from AUTHOR_SILENT as a reversal above recent highs (dc_upper as proxy for double top high). Success rate of 72% bear and 19% average decline noted in source parameters but not encoded in rules.
